note: Initial stub data. Run a full scan via the Command Center to update.

sitemapCoverage.notes: Sitemap present but references old GitHub Pages domain. Some newer pages may be missing.

metadataQuality.notes: Main pages have good titles and descriptions. Issue subpages need review.

analyticsCoverage.notes: No analytics platform detected on any page.

searchConsoleVerification.notes: No Google Search Console verification tag detected.

bingVerification.notes: No Bing Webmaster Tools verification tag detected.

robotsNoindex.notes: robots.txt configured. Admin disallowed. Public pages accessible.

canonicalTags.notes: Main pages have canonical tags. Issue subpages need review.

brokenLinks.notes: One broken link found: Instagram footer link is a placeholder (#).

accessibility.notes: Missing ARIA labels on some elements. Heading hierarchy should be reviewed.

performance.notes: Persona PNG images likely unoptimized. No lazy loading on below-fold images.

mobileUX.notes: Responsive layout works well. Mobile nav functional.

schema.notes: FAQPage schema on homepage. Issue pages and subpages lack structured data.

internalLinking.notes: All 9 issue subpages verified with back-links to issues overview. Footer nav minimal but functional.

imageAltText.notes: Some persona and social images may have generic or missing alt text.

llmDiscoverability.notes: No llms.txt file. No explicit AI agent guidance. Entity markup minimal.

securityPrivacy.notes: Deployed on Cloudflare Pages (HTTPS). No mixed content. Admin is disallowed and noindexed.

campaignCompliance.notes: Good candidate disclosure. No paid advertising so no disclaimer requirements triggered.

aiTransparency.notes: Dedicated AI transparency page at /pages/ai.html. Clear disclosure language.

spendingTransparency.notes: Spending section on homepage. Budget cap prominently featured.

contentFreshness.notes: Site launched recently. Content freshness should be monitored as campaign progresses.
